channel.title: heap on Dorin Fodor
channel.description: Recent content in heap on Dorin Fodor

item.title: Data Structures in Go: Heap
item.description: Introduction In this article I want us to look at my implementation of a Heap data structure in Go. I assume that you are already familiar with the theory behind what a Heap is and its properties but if you’re not then I will try to briefly explain this to you below and also tell you about some resources where you can learn more. What is a Heap If I had to explain it in my own words, I would say that a Heap is a data structure which can be visualised as a nearly-complete binary tree (read my post on Trees) and stores its data in an underlying array.
